messages.content: Got it — a summer backend internship is a clear target. How much time can you carve out each weekday for practice?
Probably 30 minutes most weekdays, sometimes an hour.

captured_so_far.primary_goal: land a backend SWE internship this summer

notes: Should extract time_budget_min: 30 (taking the lower realistic value the user gave) and ask a meaningful follow-up — not wrap up yet.
